summary: Backend testing complete for business creation and categories API. All 11 tests passed (100% success rate). The categories endpoint correctly returns 8 root categories with subcategories, and business creation with category selection works properly.

minor.issue: Warning about bcrypt version attribute - 'module bcrypt has no attribute __about__'. This is a non-blocking warning from passlib library.

categories_endpoint.GET /api/categories: PASS - Returns 8 root categories with 71 total subcategories
categories_endpoint.structure: Each category has name, slug, and subcategories array with modules and tools

business_endpoints.GET /api/businesses/my: PASS - Returns user's business (biz_8ddeaa84bd75) with correct category data
business_endpoints.GET /api/businesses/{id}: PASS - Returns full business detail with events, posts, stories
business_endpoints.POST /api/businesses: PASS - Creates new business with category selection

media_endpoint.POST /api/media/upload: PASS - Endpoint exists and returns 422 for missing file (expected)

fixes_verified.translations_added: VERIFIED - All translation keys present in EN, DE, EL (description, address, searchAddress, selectFirst, rootCategory, subcategory)
fixes_verified.category_selection: VERIFIED - 8 root categories returned with proper subcategory structure for UI selection

test_credentials: Used session token: session_f588d32cf9474944b86b00d8325e3267 and created test users
seed_data_creation: Test business created during test: TEST_Business_* (with italian restaurant category)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Business creation flow and categories API verified working. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_business_categories.py can be used for regression testing. The existing business biz_8ddeaa84bd75 is in bars-nightlife/cocktail-bars category.
